author: lu_pinto
content: ok I've been thinking about this a little more and there are benefits for making the `tx.gas` parameter tighter based on intrinsic costs for builders. I think the proposal is sound 👍

author: lu_pinto
content: I'm willing to forfeit this PR https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11778 if those changes go through

author: chfast
content: Not sure this was discussed already, but current 8037 has this annoying property it overcharges for account creation in some cases (e.g. CREATE) and then sometimes on success refunds this cost if no new account was created. I now need to propagate this bit of information up from a child frame.

author: lu_pinto
content: In what cases is an account not created but the frame finishes successfully?
